text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.title: Mutants and Zombies
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.bl: If enabled, Blister Zombies will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.cr: If enabled, Crawlers will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.sp: If enabled, Spitters will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.zo: If enabled, Zombie Brutes will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.sp: If enabled, Split Head Zombies will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.mu: If enabled, Mutant Brutes will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.ro: If enabled, Rotten Mutant will spawn naturally | default: enabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.sp: If enabled, Spitters will break logs and leaves in their path | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.zo: Zombie Brutes break leaves and logs
If enabled, Zombie Brutes will break logs and leaves in their path | default: disabled
text.autoconfig.mutantszombies.option.mu: Mutant Brutes break leaves and logs
If enabled, Mutant Brutes will break logs and leaves in their path | default: disabled
